issues.detail: The skill does not fully handle all error scenarios such as encrypted PDFs, invalid page ranges, or permission errors.
The skill requires Python 3.9+ and specific libraries, limiting its use to Python environments.

scenarios.name: merge-quarterly
scenarios.rationale: Baseline merges correctly with PdfMerger but skips pre-validation and reporting; treatment validates each file via PdfReader, merges in order, then reports total page count as the skill outlines.

scenarios.name: extract-mixed-pages
scenarios.rationale: Both expand the range correctly and use PdfReader/PdfWriter with 1-based-to-0-based indexing; treatment adds the bounds check and structured reporting that the skill prescribes.
